test_cases.name: Ad-hoc config doc update
test_cases.prompt: The max_bytes_per_tag_values_query limit default was changed in the querier. Update the docs to reflect the new default.
assertions: Agent reads querier config.go and finds RegisterFlagsAndApplyDefaults to get the actual default value
Agent validates the new default matches the code before finalizing

test_cases.name: 3.0 terminology migration
test_cases.prompt: Update a doc page that still references 'ingester' to use the correct 3.0 terminology.
assertions: Agent reads architecture.md to determine current component names
Agent replaces 'ingester' with 'live-store' or 'block-builder' depending on context (reads vs writes-to-storage)
Agent uses hyphenated names in prose, underscores in YAML examples
Agent does not reference modules/ingester/ — it is legacy code pending removal, not a current component

test_cases.name: TraceQL doc update
test_cases.prompt: Add documentation for a new TraceQL intrinsic called span:childCount.
assertions: Agent checks pkg/traceql/ for the intrinsic implementation
Agent places content in docs/sources/tempo/traceql/ (not configuration/)
Agent reads sibling TraceQL docs to match existing structure and depth

test_cases.name: Helm chart configuration doc
test_cases.prompt: Document a new Helm chart value for configuring live-store replicas in tempo-distributed.
assertions: Agent identifies docs/sources/helm-charts/tempo-distributed/ as the primary location
Agent checks whether configuration/ pages also need updating
Agent uses 'live-store' (hyphenated) in prose and live_store (underscore) in YAML
Agent does not create a new page if existing content can be extended

grading.comparison: Run each test case with and without the skill. Grade assertion pass rates for both runs.
